calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Regarding Authority Of Individual Co-Trustees To Direct Sale Or Retention Of Weyerhauser Company Stock And Establi
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee).

Mr. Skootsky addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
